title: NZ Government Web Accessibility Standard 1.2
description: Mandatory web accessibility standard for NZ government public service departments requiring conformance to WCAG 2.2 Level AA for all publicly and internally facing web pages, effective 17 March 2025. Includes specific exceptions for complex visual maps, prerecorded media, and inactive pages.
